steps.title: Interpret the count
steps.content: A perfect square equals $0$ only when its base is $0$, giving the single solution $x=-k$. That confirms B is correct.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above confirms B, Exactly one, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore B is correct.
